calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-06-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. EZEKIEL D. CARDER OF THE WEINBERG, ROGER & ROSENFELD LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (510)337-1001 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES' AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA'S Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. The Court also awards reasonable attorney fees in the amount of $1000 and costs in the amount of $540, for a total amount due and owing of $44,649.74. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185, Tel. No. (951)764-4047 =302/mjm
